meaning: adj.大学(学生),大学之组织的
examples: The team spirit and shared values of the athletes on Bowerman's teams carried over and provided the basis for the collegial style of management that characterized the early years of Nike.
Then he adds, "In a collegial way.
The collegial panel must have an odd number of members.
In-house rivals suddenly turn collegial and pool their expertise and services for a knockout bid.
We waited through the long silences and then nodded when he coughed, in collegial approval.
